rationale: Documentation build maps accepted GC requirements to owning KB files and clears required stale-reference audit blockers. System docs now define archive commit before tracked GC, separate GC commit, restore ledger commands, agent-owned GC review, API-owned safe GC path, validation report purge boundaries, and graph next-action expectations. Alignment and stale-reference audits pass; changed audit only warns that generated graph state changed from rebuild/build refresh and must be handled before publication.
checks: codewiki_audit profiles=[alignment,stale-reference,changed] paths=[KB docs, onboarding prompt, documentation build]

issues.summary: changed audit reports generated .codewiki/index_graph.json changed; expected after build refresh and must be refreshed/committed or regenerated before publication.

audit_reports: CodeWiki audit: warning; alignment pass; stale-reference pass; changed warning changed/generated-file-changed .codewiki/index_graph.json

isolation_requirement.reason: Fresh validation is preferred but not required for this profile.

audit_requirement.reason: Gateway profiles require deterministic audit evidence for their build or boundary context.
